report_name: AI Surpasses Ransomware as Top Cybersecurity Concern for Retail and Hospitality CISOs

tools.name: Public AI Models
tools.description: Publicly available Artificial Intelligence models and services, such as large language models, identified as a primary source of risk for the retail and hospitality sectors due to potential data leakage, insider misuse, and inadequate governance.

infrastructure.name: Public AI Service API
infrastructure.description: API endpoints for public AI services, such as api.openai.com, which can be used for submitting sensitive data, representing a data leakage or exfiltration risk.

indicators.name: Data Submission to OpenAI API
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Data Submission to OpenAI API via DNS Query
id: 9c5f8e1a-1b2c-4d5e-8f9a-0b1c2d3e4f56
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to api.openai.com, which could indicate use of public AI services with corporate data, posing a data leakage risk as highlighted in the 2026 RH-ISAC CISO Benchmark Report.
references:
  - https://www.morningstar.com/news/pr-newswire/20260401ph81812/ciso-benchmark-report-finds-ai-driving-new-era-of-cybersecurity-risk-and-investment-in-retail-and-hospitality
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-02
tags:
  - attack.t1567.002
level: informational
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|endswith: '.api.openai.com'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects DNS queries to api.openai.com. This activity is anomalous as it may represent employees submitting sensitive corporate data to public AI services, creating a data leakage risk.

indicators.name: HTTP POST to OpenAI API
indicators.pattern:
title: HTTP POST Request to OpenAI API
id: a3b4c5d6-e7f8-4a9b-8c7d-6e5f4a3b2c1d
status: experimental
description: Detects HTTP POST requests to api.openai.com. Such requests may contain sensitive corporate data being submitted to a public AI service, posing a data leakage risk as highlighted in the 2026 RH-ISAC CISO Benchmark Report.
references:
  - https://www.morningstar.com/news/pr-newswire/20260401ph81812/ciso-benchmark-report-finds-ai-driving-new-era-of-cybersecurity-risk-and-investment-in-retail-and-hospitality
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-02
tags:
  - attack.t1567.002
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    cs-host|endswith: 'api.openai.com'
    cs-method: 'POST'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects HTTP POST requests sent to api.openai.com, which may indicate the submission of sensitive data to a public large language model, creating a data leakage risk.
